messages.text: Namaste! I am Guru Dev. I am pleased to connect with you today. To provide you with the most accurate Vedic insights, could you please share your full Name, Date of Birth, Place of Birth, and the exact Time of birth?

I am deeply analyzing your birth chart and the current planetary transits. For your specific concern, I see a strong influence of Mars in your current phase. Could you please share more about your situation so I can provide a precise Vedic roadmap?

I am deeply analyzing your birth chart and the current planetary transits. For your specific concern, I see a strong influence of Venus in your current phase. Could you please share more about your situation so I can provide a precise Vedic roadmap?
